zh.lifeSummary: Charles Pine是Henry Pyne和Elizabeth的兒子，於1672年2月9日在英國英格蘭戴文比曉普斯 尼普頓受洗。他於1698年12月24日與Grace Balster在英國戴文宏尼頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1753年5月10日之前在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼波藍德波藍德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Charles Pine是Henry Pyne和Elizabeth的儿子，于1672年2月9日在英国英格兰戴文比曉普斯 尼普頓受洗。他于1698年12月24日与Grace Balster在英国戴文宏尼頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1753年5月10日之前在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼波藍德波藍德。

nameMeanings.name: Pine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English pin(e) (Old English pīn, Old French pin), a topographic name for someone who lived by a conspicuous pine tree or in a pine forest; in some cases it may originally have been a nickname for a tall man, one thought to resemble a pine tree.
English: nickname from Middle English pine ‘pain, injury, torture, punishment, infirmity’, referring to someone who suffered from an inflicted pain or punishment.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Le Pin in Calvados or some other French place called from a prominent pine.

variants.name: Pyne
meanings: English: variant of   Pine  . This name has been established in Ireland since the 16th century.

variants.name: Peine
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Alois, Hermann, Markus.
German: habitational name from Peine near Hanover.

nameMeanings.name: Charles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Germanic word, karl, meaning ‘free man’, akin to Old English ceorl ‘man’. The name, Latin form Carolus, owed its popularity in medieval Europe to the Frankish leader Charlemagne ( ?742–814 ), who in 800 established himself as Holy Roman Emperor. His name (Latin Carolus Magnus) means ‘Charles the Great’. Carolus—or Karl, the German form—was a common name among Frankish leaders, including Charlemagne's grandfather Charles Martel ( 688–741 ). Charles is the French form. The name occurs occasionally in medieval Britain as Karolus or Carolus; it had a certain vogue in West Yorkshire from the 1400s, particularly among gentry families. The form Charles was chosen by Mary Queen of Scots ( 1542–87 ), who had been brought up in France, for her son, Charles James ( 1566–1625 ), who became King James VI of Scotland and, from 1603 , James I of England. His son and grandson both reigned as King Charles , and the name thus became established in the 17th century both in the Stuart royal house and among English and Scottish supporters of the Stuart monarchy. In the 18th century it was to some extent favoured, along with James , by Jacobites, supporters of the exiled Stuarts, opposed to the Hanoverian monarchy, especially in the Highlands of Scotland. In the 19th century the popularity of the name was further enhanced by romanticization of the story of ‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’, leader of the 1745 rebellion.

en.lifeSummary: Charles Pine was christened on 9 February 1672, in Bishops Nympton, Devon, England, United Kingdom as the son of Henry Pyne and Elizabeth. He married Grace Balster on 24 December 1698, in Honiton, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died before 10 May 1753, in Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, and was buried in Cumberland, Cumberland, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Charles Pine a été baptisé le 9 février 1672, à Bishops Nympton, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Henry Pyne et Elizabeth. Il a épousé Grace Balster le 24 décembre 1698, à Honiton, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé avant 10 mai 1753, à Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, et a été enterré à Cumberland, Cumberland, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Charles Pine wurde am 9. Februar 1672 in Bishops Nympton, Devon, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Henry Pyne und Elizabeth getauft. Er hat am 24. Dezember 1698 in Honiton, Devon, England Grace Balster geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb vor 10. Mai 1753 in Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Cumberland, Cumberland, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Charles Pine è stato battezzato il 9 febbraio 1672 nel Bishops Nympton, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di Henry Pyne e Elizabeth. Lui sposato Grace Balster il 24 dicembre 1698, nel Honiton, Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì prima del 10 maggio 1753, nel Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, e fu sepolto a Cumberland, Cumberland, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Charles Pineは1672年2月9日にイギリスイギリスデボンビショプス ニーンプトンでHenry PyneとElizabethの息子として洗礼を受けた。1698年12月24日にイギリスデボンホーニトンでGrace Balsterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1753年5月10日以前にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーで死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニークウンバーランドクウンバーランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Charles Pine(은)는 1672년 2월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 비숍스 니프턴에서 Henry Pyne(와)과 Elizabeth의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1698년 12월 24일 영국 데폰 호니턴에서 Grace Balster(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1753년 5월 10일 이전 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이에서 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 c벌랜드 c벌랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Charles Pine foi batizado em 9 de fevereiro de 1672, em Bishops Nympton, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de Henry Pyne e Elizabeth. Ele casou-se com Grace Balster em 24 de dezembro de 1698, em Honiton, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 10 de maio de 1753, em Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, e foi sepultado em Cumberland, Cumberland, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Charles Pine был крещен 9 февраля 1672 г. в местности бишопс нимптон, девон, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Henry Pyne и Elizabeth. Он женился на женщине по имени Grace Balster 24 декабря 1698 г. в местности хонитон, девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер перед 10 май 1753 г. в местности массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика и был похоронен в местности кумбирланд, кумбирланд, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.
